case_number: Miscellaneous Application was dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Criminal Misc: Application No. S-430 of 2024 Date Orders with signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A No.3069/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A No.3070/2025 (561-A). 03-07-2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Janwari, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, D.P.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2. It appears that due to non-appearance of the applicant and his learned counsel, instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application was dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 05.06.2025. Learned counsel for applicant submits that grievance of the applicant is that her son was done to death at the hands of police showing fake police encounter and such case bearing crime No.49/2024 for offence punishable under Sections 402,399,324,353,34 PPC was registered at PS Dakhan. He prayed that if instant application is not restored, the applicant will sustain irreparable loss; contention raised by the learned counsel requires consideration, accordingly, the Criminal Miscellaneous Application is restored allowing the application to its original stage when it was dismissed for non- prosecution. Since Criminal Miscellaneous Application has been restored and after arguing at some length, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he is not pressing the instant application if he may be given a chance to file a direct complaint before the competent court of law having jurisdiction, such proposal is not opposed by the learned DPG. In view of above, this criminal miscellaneous application is disposed off, however applicant Mst. Naheed Khatoon is at liberty to file a Direct Complaint before the competent Court of law having jurisdiction, if she wishes so.

In view of above, this criminal miscellaneous application is disposed off, however applicant Mst. Naheed Khatoon is at liberty to file a Direct Complaint before the competent Court of law having jurisdiction, if she wishes so. Judg
